widget.convert: {"template": [ MultiContentEntryPixmapAlphaTest(pos = (50, 5), size = (90, 90), png = 1), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (160, 32), size = (620, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 2), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (800, 32), size = (250, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 0), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (1080, 32), size = (100, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 3), MultiContentEntryText(pos = (1210, 32), size = (100, 35), font=0, flags = RT_HALIGN_LEFT|RT_VALIGN_CENTER, text = 4), ], "fonts": [gFont("Regular", 32)], "itemHeight": 100 }
